goals.text: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Identifies the main idea with 40% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Uses correct past-tense verbs with 50% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
